description: CPU-heavy work runs on the UI isolate, blocking the event loop and dropping frames even though it is in an async function.
body: Failure mode: a large JSON parse, image transform, or crypto loop runs synchronously on the UI isolate, and because async/await does not parallelize CPU work, the event loop is blocked, frames are missed, and the app janks or freezes during the operation. Detection signals: DevTools shows long UI-isolate stalls and frames over budget; the work is heavy and synchronous despite being awaited; the UI freezes during the action. Do not run CPU-bound work on the UI isolate. Safer fallback: offload it to a background isolate with compute() or Isolate.run, stream results back to update state, design isolate message payloads to limit copying, and re-profile to confirm frames return under budget.
